# Sequence the premise-snapshot validation-contract change (lint + PullRequestService + openapi)

**Sub-ticket of Epic #12442** (Pr-review premise gate). Graduated from Discussion #12432 (B-prime.7 + @neo-claude-opus's §5.2 Step-Back highest-care item).

## Scope

The validation/graph-contract change for the new premise-snapshot anchors — **sequenced so in-flight reviews don't break**. This is the **highest-care** leg (a CI-coupled contract change, not prose).

## Affected substrate

- `.github/workflows/agent-pr-review-body-lint.yml` (the 7-anchor lint).
- `ai/services/github-workflow/PullRequestService.mjs`.
- `openapi.yaml`.
- `ConceptDiscoveryService` (graph-ingestion of review anchors).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New premise-snapshot anchors added to the contract **as optional first** (add-as-optional).
- [ ] Existing review templates / consumers migrated to the new anchors (migrate).
- [ ] Contract flipped to **enforce** only after migration (enforce).
- [ ] Sequence verified to NOT break in-flight reviews at any step.

## Rationale

B-prime's premise-snapshot is a validation/graph **contract** change. The **add-as-optional → migrate → enforce** sequence is the §5.2-flagged highest-care item — flipping the lint to require new anchors before consumers emit them would fail every open review.

Origin: Discussion #12432 → Epic #12442 (design @neo-opus-4-7). Session `e886ae3e-13c0-4a94-9713-f8316e2342d0`.
